overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Western game showing a character in a cowboy hat navigating a rainy historic New Orleans-style district at night. The character walks past neon-lit storefronts, through narrow brick alleyways, and explores enclosed courtyards with period architecture and gas lamp lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with neon restaurant signage

events.description: character turns left at the street corner near the restaurant

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wet cobblestone street past the illuminated Jade Dragon Restaurant

entered.detail: large illuminated neon sign with red lettering mounted on building facade
multi-story historic brick building with tall windows and wrought iron details
period-appropriate street lamp casting warm yellow light
rain-slicked cobblestone street reflecting the gas lamp light
wooden barrel sitting on the sidewalk near the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet cobblestone street at night, passing the illuminated Jade Dragon Restaurant with its prominent neon sign. Gas lamps cast warm light on the historic brick buildings as the character turns left at the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined historic street approaching covered passage

events.description: approaching and entering the dark archway entrance between buildings

large trees lining the left side of the street
decorative iron balcony railings on the upper floors
red Chinese-style paper lantern hanging near the archway

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a tree-lined street toward a dark archway entrance. The historic brick buildings feature wrought iron balconies, and a red paper lantern marks the passage entrance as the character approaches the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow brick corridor with wall-mounted lanterns

events.description: entering dark covered corridor with dim wall-mounted lighting
emerging from the dark corridor into an open courtyard

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dark narrow brick corridor toward the light at the courtyard exit

dim wall-mounted lantern providing minimal illumination
metal barred gate at the end of the corridor
wooden exterior staircase leading to upper floors
two-story brick building with balconies visible through the archway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, narrow brick corridor with minimal lighting from wall-mounted lanterns. Passing through the tunnel, the character emerges into a brighter open courtyard with exterior wooden staircases and balconies.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed brick courtyard with dual exterior staircases

events.description: character turns to survey and explore different areas of the courtyard

agents.ego_description: exploring the quiet courtyard, walking between exterior staircases and outdoor seating areas

wrought iron railings on the second floor balconies
wooden table and chairs set up in the courtyard
large potted plants and foliage near the building walls
arched wooden doorway with glass panels

segments.scene_description: The character explores an enclosed brick courtyard featuring dual exterior wooden staircases and wrought iron balcony railings. The area contains outdoor dining furniture and potted plants, with warm light from wall sconces illuminating the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service passage leading to rear courtyard

events.description: entering second narrow brick passage from the courtyard
emerging into final rear courtyard area with large windows

agents.ego_description: passing through a tight brick corridor and emerging into a dimly lit rear courtyard area

entered.detail: tight brick walls of the service corridor
open courtyard area with different lighting and vegetation
large tropical palm plant in the courtyard
stacked wooden barrels near the wall
building facade with large multi-pane windows

segments.scene_description: The character enters a second narrow brick passage leading from the main courtyard. Emerging into a rear courtyard area, the scene features large tropical plants, wooden barrels, and buildings with large windows under dim artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit street into a series of secluded, historic brick courtyards. It begins on a wet cobblestone street passing the glowing neon sign of the Jade Dragon Restaurant and warm gas lamps before the character turns a corner toward a tree-lined path. As the character approaches a red paper lantern, the scene shifts from the open street into a dark, narrow brick corridor with minimal lantern light. The camera then emerges from the tunnel into a bright open courtyard featuring wooden staircases, wrought iron balconies, and outdoor dining furniture illuminated by wall sconces. Finally, the movement leads through a second narrow passage into a rear courtyard filled with large tropical plants and wooden barrels under dim artificial lighting.
